name: Washington Chowder
recipeInstructions:
1. Gently combine the diced potato, onion, and chicken broth in a large pot.
2. Bring to a simmer over low heat until the potatoes are tender.
3. Stir in the remaining ingredients: stewed tomatoes, whole-kernel corn, light cream, salt, and pepper.
4. Warm through without boiling. Serve immediately.
DO NOT BOIL. Makes 1 1/4 quarts. From Massachusetts Dairy Sampler by Massachusetts Dairy Industry
